channel.title: Aspen Blog
channel.description: Thoughts on local AI, privacy, and owning your intelligence.

item.title: Beyond the $20 Monthly Fee: The Real Cost of ChatGPT Plus vs. Local AI
item.description: Stop paying the monthly AI tax. Compare the direct and hidden costs of ChatGPT Plus subscriptions against the long-term value and privacy of running local AI with Aspen.

item.title: AI Independence: Why it Matters More Than You Think
item.description: Discover why moving toward local-first AI is about more than just privacy—it's about reclaiming your digital autonomy and cognitive sovereignty.

item.title: The Privacy vs. Power Trade-off: My Honest Comparison of Local AI and ChatGPT
item.description: Is cloud-based AI a privacy risk? Compare the pros and cons of ChatGPT versus local-first AI like Aspen to find the right workflow for you.
